title: Bouncing Image
description: Mod that adds cool bouncing image like dvd logo
body:
# What is Bouncing Image?
This is a mod that adds cool bouncing image on your screen. By default the image is dvd logo but you can change it in the mod settings with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).

# How to change bouncing image?
You need a link to your image. Then you need to go to the mod settings in [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). Then you need to paste a link into big black box and press Apply button.

<details>
<summary>Where</summary>

![here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6a22cc504d0277b935d61616f146b8a506207dc.png)
![here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/282c900f61c16696908772ad5abee6a1ea0f49bb.png)
![here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/598e4d268be4836732f5ae4766dca1552f377466.png)

</details>

# What else can I do with bouncing image?
You can change it's scale and speed or just disable it. Also you can add rectangles from which the image will bounce off.

# 
Feel free to post bug report or feature request on github
